channel.title: Modal Resonance Writing
channel.description: Technical perspectives on AI systems, privacy, and evaluation from the Modal Resonance team.

item.title: Mapping Privacy Risk Across the AI Lifecycle
item.description: A structured breakdown of where privacy risk lives across the four phases of the AI lifecycle, and what genuinely changes with generative AI versus traditional ML.
item.author: Omar Ali Fdal, Matteo Giomi
